purpose: Execution dependency and conflict-control graph for the reusable platform foundation.

reason.zh: 技术栈路线会影响所有后续实现，必须串行评审。
reason.en: Target stack changes affect all downstream implementation and must be reviewed serially.

reason.zh: 能力声明是插件接入合同，避免并行改动产生注册漂移。
reason.en: Capability manifests are plugin entry contracts; parallel edits can create registration drift.

reason.zh: 能力组合影响启用面和生产 profile，必须避免并行冲突。
reason.en: Capability profiles affect enabled surfaces and production profiles, so conflicting parallel work is blocked.

reason.zh: 后台资源合同驱动 OpenAPI、代码生成和 UI，不能并行改写。
reason.en: Admin resource contracts drive OpenAPI, codegen and UI, so concurrent rewrites are blocked.

reason.zh: 通用资源 API 是前后端共享边界，改动需要串行验证。
reason.en: The generic resource API is a shared frontend/backend boundary and needs serial validation.

reason.zh: 权限码、数据范围和菜单可见性必须保持一致。
reason.en: Permission codes, data scopes and menu visibility must stay aligned.

reason.zh: Casbin 授权语义影响生产访问控制，不能和 RBAC 改动脱节。
reason.en: Casbin authorization semantics affect production access control and must not drift from RBAC changes.

reason.zh: JWT、会话和 Provider 影响认证安全边界。
reason.en: JWT, session and provider changes affect the authentication security boundary.

reason.zh: 持久化运行时和迁移路径需要单一写入责任。
reason.en: Storage runtime and migration paths need a single writer responsibility.

reason.zh: 缓存和 Redis 失效规则会影响多实例一致性。
reason.en: Cache and Redis invalidation rules affect multi-instance consistency.

reason.zh: 生产配置门禁会影响发布和运维策略。
reason.en: Production configuration gates affect release and operations policy.

reason.zh: 后台 UI 组件和布局需要统一设计与浏览器验收。
reason.en: Admin UI components and layout need unified design and browser validation.

reason.zh: 共享组件文案必须中英文同步，避免分支漂移。
reason.en: Shared component copy must keep Chinese and English dictionaries synchronized.

reason.zh: 浏览器截图和响应式验收需要稳定页面状态。
reason.en: Browser screenshots and responsive QA need stable page state.

reason.zh: OpenAPI 是外部集成和生成器输入。
reason.en: OpenAPI is an external integration and generator input.

reason.zh: App API 合同影响小程序和业务能力接入。
reason.en: App API contracts affect mini-program and business capability integration.

reason.zh: 代码生成和源码写入策略必须保持 dry-run 与评审边界。
reason.en: Codegen and source-writing policy must preserve dry-run and review boundaries.

reason.zh: 审计策略影响生产操作和权限评审证据。
reason.en: Audit policy affects production operation and permission-review evidence.

reason.zh: 项目文档是协作事实源，任务节点更新时需要串行收口。
reason.en: Project docs are the collaboration source of truth and need serial closure during task updates.

reason.zh: 字段分类、密钥、加密和盲索引共同决定敏感数据边界，必须串行评审。
reason.en: Field classification, keys, encryption and blind indexes jointly define the sensitive-data boundary and require serial review.

reason.zh: 历史数据迁移会修改持久化状态，必须保持单一执行责任和可恢复游标。
reason.en: Historical data migration mutates persisted state and requires one execution owner with recoverable cursors.

reason.zh: 平台服务平面、身份、租户上下文和兼容性合同必须由单一任务冻结。
reason.en: Platform service planes, identity, tenant context and compatibility contracts must be frozen by one task.

reason.zh: 持久化查询与命令定义共同决定参数、权限和成本边界。
reason.en: Persisted query and command definitions jointly control arguments, authorization and cost boundaries.

reason.zh: 可信租户上下文的来源和传播决定所有 SaaS 隔离边界。
reason.en: Trusted TenantContext provenance and propagation define every SaaS isolation boundary.

reason.zh: 机构、角色组、角色池和用户约束必须作为一个授权合同演进。
reason.en: Organization, role-group, role-pool and user constraints must evolve as one authorization contract.

reason.zh: 组织权限迁移会改变现有授权数据，必须保持单一迁移责任。
reason.en: Organization authorization migration changes existing grant data and requires one migration owner.

reason.zh: 菜单可见性、页面按钮和 API 权限的拆分必须保持迁移一致。
reason.en: Menu visibility, page-button and API permission separation must remain migration-consistent.

reason.zh: 数据源与数据源组注册表是物理存储配置的唯一事实源。
reason.en: Datasource and DatasourceGroup registries are the single source of truth for physical storage configuration.

reason.zh: 租户放置与读写路由必须在同一确定性运行时边界内演进。
reason.en: Tenant placement and read/write routing must evolve within one deterministic runtime boundary.

reason.zh: 分片键、全局 ID、再平衡和租户迁移共享路由版本状态。
reason.en: Shard keys, global IDs, rebalancing and tenant migration share routing-version state.

reason.zh: 跨库只读查询需要独立的字段、成本、租户和超时边界。
reason.en: Cross-database read queries need independent field, cost, tenant and timeout boundaries.

reason.zh: XA 协调、启发式恢复和运维处置必须作为默认关闭的独立运行时。
reason.en: XA coordination, heuristic recovery and operator remediation must remain an independent default-off runtime.

reason.zh: 消息、搜索和事件包络合同必须在适配器实现前稳定。
reason.en: Message, search and event-envelope contracts must stabilize before adapter implementation.

reason.zh: Outbox 写入、消费幂等、重试和补偿共享事务状态。
reason.en: Outbox writes, consumer idempotency, retry and compensation share transactional state.

reason.zh: 数据库驱动、版本和特性声明必须由一个权威认证矩阵聚合。
reason.en: Database driver, version and feature claims must aggregate into one authoritative certification matrix.

reason.zh: SaaS 数据平面文档必须与路由和认证合同同步。
reason.en: SaaS data-plane documentation must stay synchronized with routing and certification contracts.

reason.zh: 组织、身份、角色和菜单治理文档必须与迁移合同同步。
reason.en: Organization, identity, role and menu governance docs must stay synchronized with migration contracts.

reason.zh: 事件、消息和搜索集成文档必须与默认关闭策略同步。
reason.en: Event, messaging and search integration docs must stay synchronized with disabled-default policy.

reason.zh: 开源可移植性、许可证和发布树必须在同一审查边界内收口。
reason.en: Open-source portability, licensing and the release tree must close within one review boundary.

reason.zh: 公开文档站点的内容、构建、元数据和截图需要稳定的单一发布面。
reason.en: Public documentation content, builds, metadata and screenshots need one stable publication surface.

reason.zh: 远端仓库、Pages、Release 和可见性切换属于最终外部状态变更，必须串行执行。
reason.en: Remote repository, Pages, Release and visibility changes are final external-state mutations and must run serially.

reason.zh: 视觉、文案和浏览器验收必须作为一个体验面串行收口。
reason.en: Visual UI, copy and browser QA must close as one experience surface.

reason.zh: 资源合同、API 合同和生成器互为输入输出，不能拆开并行改。
reason.en: Resource contracts, API contracts and generators feed each other and must not be edited in conflicting parallel work.

reason.zh: 权限、认证、缓存和生产配置共同决定访问控制运行语义。
reason.en: Authorization, authentication, cache and production configuration jointly define access-control runtime semantics.

reason.zh: 敏感字段策略、存储格式和资源合同必须作为同一数据保护面串行变更。
reason.en: Sensitive field policy, storage format and resource contracts must change serially as one data-protection surface.

reason.zh: 租户身份、组织角色池、菜单权限和迁移文档必须作为同一治理面串行演进。
reason.en: Tenant identity, organization role pools, menu permissions and migration docs must evolve serially as one governance surface.

reason.zh: 数据源、路由、分片、联邦、XA 和认证声明共享同一 SaaS 数据平面。
reason.en: Datasource, routing, sharding, federation, XA and certification claims share one SaaS data plane.

reason.zh: 事件合同、Outbox 和集成文档必须保持交付语义一致。
reason.en: Event contracts, Outbox and integration docs must preserve consistent delivery semantics.

reason.zh: 开源发布树、公开站点、GitHub 状态和文档不能并行漂移。
reason.en: The open-source release tree, public site, GitHub state and documentation must not drift in parallel.

title.zh: 技术路线对齐
能力 Manifest 契约
资源 Schema 与字段配置
能力组合 Profile 门禁
插件式能力契约治理
RBAC、动态菜单与数据范围
title.en: RBAC, Dynamic Menus And Data Scope

title.zh: 租户、组织、角色组与地址码治理
title.en: Tenant, Org, Role Group And Area Governance

title.zh: 认证、会话、JWT 与微信登录边界
title.en: Auth, Session, JWT And WeChat Provider Boundary

title.zh: GORM 持久化运行时
缓存与 Redis 失效总线
生产持久化正确性
生产运行门禁
生产就绪预检
OpenAPI 与 App 路由契约

reason.zh: App OpenAPI 与 App 路由契约需要复用已确认的认证、会话和 tokenType 边界；这是合同节点对认证边界的显式输入，不代表技术栈契约阶段可以任意依赖运行时实现。
reason.en: App OpenAPI and app route contracts reuse the confirmed auth, session and tokenType boundary. This is an explicit contract input from the auth boundary, not a general allowance for stack-contract tasks to depend on runtime implementation.

title.zh: 后台 API 边界与查询安全
title.en: Admin API Boundary And Query Security

title.zh: 代码生成器预览与安全脚手架

statusReason.zh: 代码生成器的安全预览能力已实现：合同预览、脚手架计划、生成文件草稿和晋级审查包都可生成并校验；所有输出仍限制在 `resources/generated/`，源码写入显式禁用，避免未评审生成器改写运行时代码。
statusReason.en: The safe preview code generator is implemented: contract previews, scaffold plans, generated-file drafts and promotion review packets can be generated and validated. Outputs remain confined to `resources/generated/`, and runtime source writing stays explicitly disabled to prevent unreviewed generators from mutating runtime code.

completionGate.zh: 后续若要写入运行时代码，必须通过独立的 `source-writing-codegen-promotion` 节点，完成源码写入规格、人工评审、差异评审、回滚和目标族测试映射。
completionGate.en: Any future runtime source writing must go through the separate `source-writing-codegen-promotion` node with a source-writing spec, human review, diff review, rollback and target-family test mapping.

title.zh: 源码生成准入门禁
管理后台 Shell 与列表组件
品牌配置、演示数据与通用仪表盘
title.en: Branding, Demo Data And Common Dashboard

title.zh: 人员与岗位可选能力边界
通知中心可选能力边界
任务调度可选能力边界
可视化体验设计与浏览器验收
title.en: Visual Product Design And Browser QA

title.zh: 生产策略评审与审计流程
title.en: Production Policy Review And Audit Workflow

title.zh: 生产认证与 Provider 加固

statusReason.zh: 生产认证硬化已作为平台底座完成：JWT、服务端会话、滑动续期、吊销、API Token、App Token、Provider 边界、Provider 运行时策略、Provider 矩阵 manifest 覆盖、密钥轮换证据、结构化审批证据 schema、operations plan schema 透传和审计禁泄露字段均可机器校验；独立 refresh-token 家族存储、GORM 仓储、轮换、复用检测和审计脱敏运行切片已实现但默认禁用。
statusReason.en: Production auth hardening is complete as a platform foundation capability: JWTs, server-side sessions, sliding renewal, revocation, API tokens, app tokens, provider boundaries, provider runtime policy, Provider Promotion Matrix manifest coverage, credential-rotation evidence, structured approval evidence schema, operations-plan schema propagation and forbidden audit secret fields are machine-checkable. The independent refresh-token-family store, GORM repository, rotation, reuse detection and audit-redaction runtime slice is implemented but disabled by default.

completionGate.zh: 底座完成不等于启用独立 refresh-token 家族。未来如需把 refresh-token 家族绑定到默认 /api/auth/refresh 或启用未审查 Provider，仍必须先完成外部生产审批包、Redis/持久化一致性证据、轮换复放审计样本、Provider 密钥轮换 Runbook、回滚方案和生产预检测试输出。
completionGate.en: Foundation completion does not enable independent refresh-token families. Future binding of refresh-token families to the default /api/auth/refresh endpoint, or enabling an unreviewed provider, still requires the external production approval package, Redis/persistence convergence evidence, rotation replay audit samples, provider secret rotation runbook, rollback plan and production-preflight test output.

title.zh: 表单 Schema 布局与插槽规则
title.en: Form Schema Layout And Slot Rules

statusReason.zh: 表单布局与插槽能力已晋级为受控实现：PlatformResourceForm 支持 Schema 分组、帮助文案、校验、关系选择、AntD Form 透传、Refine CRUD、受控 source-level React slots、schema 驱动的 two-column-density、runtime slot descriptor、前端 slot registry 和 side-detail-preview 右侧预览栏。runtime slot 仍只允许描述符和 allowlisted registry 渲染器，源码写入、后端 React 组件名、动态组件路径和 raw script 继续禁止。
statusReason.en: Form layout and slot capability is now a controlled implementation: PlatformResourceForm supports schema groups, help text, validation, relation controls, Ant Design Form prop passthrough, Refine CRUD, controlled source-level React slots, schema-driven two-column-density, runtime slot descriptors, a frontend slot registry and the side-detail-preview rail. Runtime slots still allow only descriptors and allowlisted registry renderers; source writing, backend React component names, dynamic component paths and raw scripts remain forbidden.

completionGate.zh: 后续增强必须继续保持 registry allowlist、i18n、权限过滤、AntD Form 控件透传和 Refine CRUD 边界；业务包只能在组合根注册自有 renderer，不得让平台 core 或通用 shell import 业务代码。
completionGate.en: Follow-on enhancements must preserve registry allowlists, i18n, permission filtering, Ant Design Form control passthrough and Refine CRUD boundaries. Business packages may register their renderers at the composition root only; platform core and the generic shell must not import business code.

title.zh: Refine 自定义面板与动作迁移
title.en: Refine Custom Panels And Actions Migration

statusReason.zh: 资源路由、读权限守卫和 CRUD 已经通过 Refine 接入；自定义动作/面板已有元数据契约、示例资源、通用抽屉 Tab、安全空态、统一 action executor、i18n、UI/资源校验与浏览器截图证据。后续业务动作必须由外部业务能力通过 manifest 和自有路由接入，平台 UI 不内置具体业务包。
statusReason.en: Resource routing, read guards and CRUD are wired through Refine. Custom actions and panels have metadata contracts, sample resources, generic drawer tabs, safe empty states, a unified action executor, i18n, UI/resource validation and browser screenshot evidence. Future business actions must be provided by external business capabilities through manifests and owned routes; the platform UI ships no concrete business package.

completionGate.zh: 后续增强应继续保持能力路由和面板数据源由能力包拥有；更复杂的审批、文件和业务面板需要另走 product-design、i18n、浏览器截图和能力包内测试。
completionGate.en: Follow-on enhancements must keep capability routes and panel data sources owned by capability packages. Richer approval, file and business panels require separate product-design, i18n, browser screenshot and capability-owned tests.

title.zh: 文件预览与操作审计体验
title.en: File Preview And Operation Audit Experience

statusReason.zh: 已按组件化方案在 files 通用资源控制台内实现上传、预览、下载、删除、元数据抽屉、审计 tab、移动文件卡片和主题同步样式；审计资源未暴露时降级展示声明事件，不发起无效 audit-logs 请求。
statusReason.en: Implemented upload, preview, download, delete, metadata drawer, audit tab, mobile file cards and theme-synced styling inside the files generic resource console. When the audit resource is not exposed, the audit tab degrades to declared events without invalid audit-logs requests.

completionGate.zh: 完成证据：superpowers:brainstorming 与 product-design brief 已按既定组件化方案执行；浏览器截图覆盖桌面预览、桌面审计、移动卡片和移动预览；当前导航控制台无错误且 fetch/xhr 无 4xx/5xx。
completionGate.en: Completion evidence: the established componentized superpowers:brainstorming and product-design brief was followed; browser screenshots cover desktop preview, desktop audit, mobile cards and mobile preview; the current navigation has no console errors and no fetch/xhr 4xx/5xx.

title.zh: 策略评审自定义控制台

statusReason.zh: 策略评审自定义控制台已作为可选平台治理 UI 实现：PolicyReviewConsole 覆盖评审队列、状态筛选、提交、通过、驳回、证据导出、变更摘要和审计轨迹；审计查询使用 audit-logs schema 声明的 createdAt 排序，避免被后端安全查询门禁拒绝。
statusReason.en: The policy-review custom console is implemented as an optional platform-governance UI. PolicyReviewConsole covers the review queue, status filtering, request, approve, reject, evidence export, change summary and audit trail; audit queries sort by the audit-logs schema-declared createdAt field so the backend safe-query gate accepts them.

completionGate.zh: 完成证据：浏览器截图覆盖桌面评审队列、驳回弹窗、变更摘要、审计轨迹、导出入口和 390px 窄屏响应式；API 行为测试、i18n、UI 合同、前端构建和任务图校验继续作为回归门禁。
completionGate.en: Completion evidence: browser screenshots cover the desktop review queue, reject modal, change summary, audit trail, export entry and 390px narrow responsive viewport; API behavior tests, i18n, UI contracts, frontend build and task-graph validation remain regression gates.

title.zh: 源码写入代码生成骨架门禁

statusReason.zh: 源码生成器当前完成范围是骨架、入口、预览、脚手架草稿、目标族映射、运行时目标白名单和晋级审查包；源码写入仍显式禁用，生成物只能作为评审 artifact。
statusReason.en: The current source generator scope is skeleton, entrypoints, previews, scaffold drafts, target-family mappings, runtime target allowlists and promotion review packets. Source writing remains explicitly disabled and generated files are review artifacts only.

completionGate.zh: 未来如需把生成器从 dry-run 改为受控源码写入，必须另走独立源码写入规格、平台/生成器/运行时/运维批准、完成证据 artifact schema、晋级审查包批准、运行时目标白名单、冲突处理、回滚方案和每个目标族的 `rtk` 测试映射。
completionGate.en: Future promotion from dry-run to controlled source writing requires a separate source-writing spec, platform/codegen/runtime/operations approval, completed-evidence artifact schema, approved promotion review packet, runtime target allowlist, conflict handling, rollback plan and `rtk` test mappings per target family.

title.zh: 任务依赖与冲突治理
参考项目发现与能力分类门禁
title.en: Reference Discovery And Capability Classification Gate

title.zh: 参考覆盖与业务边界门禁
title.en: Reference Coverage And Business Boundary Gate

title.zh: 节点收口审计
底座目标一致性与冲突审计
title.en: Foundation Goal Alignment And Conflict Audit

title.zh: 管理台 UI 系统质量加固

reason.zh: 该管理台加固节点在底座收口后激活，必须以已完成的生产持久化正确性为前置输入；这是已批准的后续 UI 质量节点对生产治理结果的显式依赖，不允许其他管理台节点绕过正常阶段顺序。
reason.en: This Admin hardening node was activated after foundation closeout and requires completed production persistence correctness as an explicit prerequisite. This approved follow-on UI quality dependency does not allow other Admin tasks to bypass normal phase ordering.

title.zh: 生产级管理台 OIDC 认证

completionEvidence.description: Redacted production-like Keycloak or equivalent OIDC provider rehearsal covering configured Admin discovery, bound-user login, failure normalization, session refresh, logout, and protected navigation.
Redacted browser acceptance for success, cancellation, invalid or expired state, missing binding, disabled user, retry, keyboard operation, and callback recovery at all required viewports.
Neat-freak documentation and knowledge cleanup evidence followed by a closed node-closeout audit entry.

title.zh: 运行时安全收敛
管理台水印与导出治理
敏感数据保护运行时
敏感数据历史迁移
可配置脱敏策略运行时
敏感数据验证后查看
数据生命周期与保留策略
平台服务合同标准
持久化查询与命令对象运行时
title.en: Persisted Query And Command Object Runtime

title.zh: 默认关闭的集成端口
组织权限与菜单合同迁移设计
title.en: Organization RBAC And Menu Contract Migration Design

title.zh: 组织角色池后端约束与迁移
title.en: Organization Role Pool Backend And Migration

title.zh: 组织与用户管理体验

checks: no horizontal overflow, console errors or failed first-party requests

title.zh: 角色树与授权入口

checks: permission search, select, review, save and reload
focus restoration and 44px role and Tree Transfer checkbox touch targets
no horizontal overflow, console errors or failed first-party requests
menu assignment remains read-only until the next node

title.zh: 菜单树与页面按钮权限配置
title.en: Menu Tree And Button Permission Configuration

statusReason.zh: 目录/页面菜单、路由元信息、页面按钮和独立 role_menu 分配合同已实现；目标菜单服务、迁移写入、全主体双读等价和切换/回滚仍保持关闭，由组织权限与菜单全链路验收节点负责。
statusReason.en: Directory/page menus, route metadata, page buttons and the independent role_menu assignment contract are implemented; target menu serving, migration writes, all-principal dual-read equivalence and cutover/rollback remain closed under the organization RBAC and menu end-to-end QA node.

completionGate.zh: 完成目录/页面菜单树、路由与参数配置、页面按钮资源和独立角色菜单分配，保持 API 权限为后端最终边界。
completionGate.en: Complete directory/page menu trees, route and parameter configuration, page-button resources and independent role-menu assignment while preserving API permissions as the final backend boundary.

title.zh: 组织权限与菜单全链路验收
title.en: Organization RBAC And Menu End-To-End QA

title.zh: 统一错误码治理

statusReason.zh: 统一错误码注册表、生命周期、响应脱敏、请求追踪和生成合同已实现；事件传播与 OpenTelemetry 仍属于后续能力。
statusReason.en: The unified error-code registry, lifecycle, response redaction, request correlation and generated contracts are implemented; event propagation and OpenTelemetry remain future capabilities.

completionGate.zh: 建立稳定错误码注册表及所有权、受众、HTTP 映射、重试、脱敏、兼容和弃用元数据；所有响应构造器与适配器统一解析；请求/追踪 ID 贯通响应、日志和审计；OpenAPI 与 Go/TypeScript 代码生成公开合同；重复、重分配、未记录和无弃用删除均由验证器阻断，并覆盖授权、校验、未找到、冲突、限流/成本、依赖与内部失败路径。
completionGate.en: Establish one stable registry with ownership, audience, HTTP mapping, retryability, redaction, compatibility and deprecation metadata; route every response constructor and adapter through it; correlate response, log and audit records with request/trace IDs; expose the public contract through OpenAPI and Go/TypeScript codegen; reject duplicate, reassigned, undocumented and removed-without-deprecation codes; and contract-test authorization, validation, not-found, conflict, rate/cost, dependency and internal failures without leaking schema, credentials, PII or adapter errors.

title.zh: 数据源注册表运行时基础

statusReason.zh: 用户明确将此能力移出 v0.1.0 发布边界；合同、依赖、资源锁和完成门保持可见，等待发布后目标重新激活。
statusReason.en: The user explicitly moved this capability outside the v0.1.0 release boundary; its contract, dependencies, resource locks and completion gate remain visible for post-release activation.

completionGate.zh: 完成版本化数据源与数据源组、能力绑定、加密配置引用、启动验证、健康状态和单数据源/分片事务钉住。
completionGate.en: Complete versioned Datasource and DatasourceGroup configuration, capability binding, encrypted configuration references, startup validation, health state and single-datasource/shard transaction pinning.

title.zh: 租户放置与请求路由

statusReason.zh: 用户明确将此能力移出 v0.1.0 发布边界；合同、依赖、资源锁和完成门保持可见，等待发布后目标重新激活。
statusReason.en: The user explicitly moved this capability outside the v0.1.0 release boundary; its contract, dependencies, resource locks and completion gate remain visible for post-release activation.

completionGate.zh: 完成 TenantPlacement 控制面、状态与迁移审计、可信上下文解析以及高权限限域 override。
completionGate.en: Complete the TenantPlacement control plane, state and migration audit, trusted-context resolution and privileged scoped override.

title.zh: 数据源读写路由

statusReason.zh: 用户明确将此能力移出 v0.1.0 发布边界；合同、依赖、资源锁和完成门保持可见，等待发布后目标重新激活。
statusReason.en: The user explicitly moved this capability outside the v0.1.0 release boundary; its contract, dependencies, resource locks and completion gate remain visible for post-release activation.

completionGate.zh: 完成 dbresolver 或等价适配、写与事务强制主库、sticky window、延迟健康、故障回退和路由证据。
completionGate.en: Complete dbresolver or equivalent routing, primary enforcement for writes and transactions, sticky windows, lag health, failure fallback and routing evidence.

title.zh: 分片与租户迁移

statusReason.zh: 用户明确将此能力移出 v0.1.0 发布边界；合同、依赖、资源锁和完成门保持可见，等待发布后目标重新激活。
statusReason.en: The user explicitly moved this capability outside the v0.1.0 release boundary; its contract, dependencies, resource locks and completion gate remain visible for post-release activation.

completionGate.zh: 完成分片路由、全局 ID、版本化放置、扩容再平衡和带检查点、审计与补偿的租户迁移。
completionGate.en: Complete shard routing, global IDs, versioned placement, expansion/rebalancing and tenant migration with checkpoints, audit and compensation.

title.zh: 受控联邦只读查询

statusReason.zh: 用户明确将此能力移出 v0.1.0 发布边界；合同、依赖、资源锁和完成门保持可见，等待发布后目标重新激活。
statusReason.en: The user explicitly moved this capability outside the v0.1.0 release boundary; its contract, dependencies, resource locks and completion gate remain visible for post-release activation.

completionGate.zh: 完成仅面向持久化报表定义的只读联邦执行器，禁止普通 OLTP Repository 跨库 Join，并验证隔离与资源限制。
completionGate.en: Complete a read-only federated executor only for persisted report definitions, forbid cross-database joins in ordinary OLTP repositories and verify isolation and resource limits.

title.zh: 可选 XA 适配器

statusReason.zh: 用户明确将此能力移出 v0.1.0 发布边界；合同、依赖、资源锁和完成门保持可见，等待发布后目标重新激活。
statusReason.en: The user explicitly moved this capability outside the v0.1.0 release boundary; its contract, dependencies, resource locks and completion gate remain visible for post-release activation.

completionGate.zh: 完成默认关闭适配器、超时边界、prepare/commit/rollback 证据、启发式恢复记录和运维处置；不替代 Outbox/Saga 默认路径。
completionGate.en: Complete the default-off adapter, timeout bounds, prepare/commit/rollback evidence, heuristic recovery records and operator remediation without replacing the default Outbox/Saga path.

title.zh: 数据库认证矩阵

statusReason.zh: 用户明确将此能力移出 v0.1.0 发布边界；合同、依赖、资源锁和完成门保持可见，等待发布后目标重新激活。
statusReason.en: The user explicitly moved this capability outside the v0.1.0 release boundary; its contract, dependencies, resource locks and completion gate remain visible for post-release activation.

completionGate.zh: 按驱动、版本和特性聚合自动化认证；任何未通过组合必须明确标记 experimental 或 unsupported。
completionGate.en: Aggregate automated certification by driver, version and feature and label every unverified combination experimental or unsupported.

title.zh: 事务 Outbox 与单一消息队列适配器
title.en: Transactional Outbox And One MQ Adapter

statusReason.zh: 用户明确将此能力移出 v0.1.0 发布边界；合同、依赖、资源锁和完成门保持可见，等待发布后目标重新激活。
statusReason.en: The user explicitly moved this capability outside the v0.1.0 release boundary; its contract, dependencies, resource locks and completion gate remain visible for post-release activation.

completionGate.zh: 完成事务 Outbox、版本化事件包络、trace context、幂等消费、重试/死信/重放、Saga 补偿，并只认证一个 MQ 适配器。
completionGate.en: Complete transactional Outbox, versioned event envelopes, trace context, idempotent consumption, retry/dead-letter/replay, Saga compensation and exactly one certified MQ adapter.

title.zh: 异步搜索投影

statusReason.zh: 用户明确将此能力移出 v0.1.0 发布边界；合同、依赖、资源锁和完成门保持可见，等待发布后目标重新激活。
statusReason.en: The user explicitly moved this capability outside the v0.1.0 release boundary; its contract, dependencies, resource locks and completion gate remain visible for post-release activation.

completionGate.zh: 完成可重建投影、重放与删除同步、字段白名单、租户隔离、成本限制和关系数据库事实源边界。
completionGate.en: Complete rebuildable projection, replay and deletion synchronization, field allowlists, tenant isolation, cost limits and relational source-of-truth boundaries.

title.zh: 开源可移植性

statusReason.zh: 已完成公开模块路径、参考快照、无 rtk 公共命令、严格发布树扫描和独立外部能力示例。
statusReason.en: Public module path, tracked reference snapshot, public commands without rtk, strict release-tree scanning and an independent external capability example are verified.

completionGate.zh: 完成模块路径迁移、跟踪参考快照、无 rtk 公共命令、历史与发布树扫描以及独立外部能力示例。
completionGate.en: Complete module-path migration, tracked reference snapshots, public commands without rtk, history/release-tree scans and the independent external-capability example.

title.zh: 公开文档与社区治理

statusReason.zh: 社区治理文件、双语核心文档和公开链接校验已达到发布质量。
statusReason.en: Community governance files, bilingual core documentation and public link checks are publication-ready.

completionGate.zh: 完成 Apache-2.0/NOTICE、社区文件、开发与运维手册、配置/API/升级参考和链接校验。
completionGate.en: Complete Apache-2.0/NOTICE, community files, developer/operator guides, configuration/API/upgrade references and link validation.

title.zh: 公开文档站点

statusReason.zh: Docusaurus 中文默认、英文核心指南、SEO 元数据、GitHub Pages 工作流和双端构建已验证。
statusReason.en: The Chinese-default Docusaurus site, English core guides, SEO metadata, GitHub Pages workflow and desktop/mobile-ready build are verified.

completionGate.zh: 完成 Product Design 方向、design-taste-frontend 审美复核、站点构建、SEO 元数据和移动/桌面浏览器验收。 alibaba/page-agent 仅可作为站点默认关闭的可选子能力，通过显式构建标志启用；启用前必须完成许可证、NOTICE/SBOM、依赖与密钥扫描、CSP、出站端点、隐私/遥测、最小权限和回滚开关审查，并验证默认构建不包含其包或网络初始化。
completionGate.en: Complete Product Design direction, design-taste-frontend art review, site build, SEO metadata and mobile/desktop browser acceptance. alibaba/page-agent may exist only as a default-off site sub-capability enabled by an explicit build flag; before enablement verify license, NOTICE/SBOM, dependency and secret scans, CSP, outbound endpoints, privacy/telemetry, least privilege and rollback controls, and prove the default build contains no page-agent bundle or network initialization.

title.zh: GitHub 发布与仓库展示

statusReason.zh: 已完成公开仓库、main 默认分支、CI、Pages、v0.1.0 Release 和仓库可见性验证。
statusReason.en: The public repository, main default branch, CI, Pages, v0.1.0 release and repository visibility are verified.

completionGate.zh: 创建公开仓库并以 main 作为唯一长期分支，验证净化提交、CI、Pages、v0.1.0 和仓库展示。
completionGate.en: Create the public repository with main as the only long-lived project branch and verify the sanitized commit, CI, Pages, v0.1.0 and repository presentation.

parallelBatches.description: Independent non-visual gates that can run after resource schema and auth boundaries are stable.
Extension-boundary planning that must stay outside platform default runtime source.
Visual QA must stay isolated from non-visual backend contract work.
Persisted Query/Command runtime and disabled integration ports may proceed after the service contract freezes separate extension seams.
